{"code":"(def unresolved-issues (sentry__list_issues {:status "unresolved"}))

(def top-issue (apply max-key :count unresolved-issues))

(def subject "Top error")
(def body (str "Issue: " (:title top-issue) "\nCount: " (:count top-issue)))

(def sent-email (email__send_email {:to "oncall@acme.io" :subject subject :body body}))
